message:
fix: batch UI fixes — sidebar border, configurator overflow, mission icons, profile dropdown (#8746)

- Sidebar pin/collapse container: add solid bg-background to prevent
  border bleed-through behind icons
- LLMd Configurator preset cards: add min-w-0 and overflow-hidden so
  TTFT/Throughput metrics don't overflow when panel space is constrained
- Mission empty state buttons: increase icons from w-5/h-5 to w-6/h-6
  for better visual balance with multi-line button text
- Profile dropdown: add max-h-[calc(100vh-5rem)] and overflow-y-auto
  so the menu scrolls instead of being cut off on small viewports

Note: Bugs 5 (DynamicCard config crash) and 6 (GitHubActivity magic
number) were already fixed in prior commits.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -151,7 +151,7 @@ export function UserProfileDropdown({ user, onLogout, onPreferences }: UserProfi
 
       {/* Dropdown menu */}
       {isOpen && (
-        <div id="profile-dropdown-menu" role="menu" className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 max-w-[calc(100vw-1rem)] bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden z-toast">
+        <div id="profile-dropdown-menu" role="menu" className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 max-w-[calc(100vw-1rem)] max-h-[calc(100vh-5rem)] bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden overflow-y-auto z-toast">
           {/* Header with avatar and name */}
           <div className="p-4 bg-secondary border-b border-border">
             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">

@@ -931,22 +931,22 @@ export function MissionSidebar() { }} className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-3 text-sm font-medium bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors h-[72px]" > - + {t('missionSidebar.startCustomMission')} )}
